title: 30 PCS Laundry Labels for Jars,Matte Minimalist Laundry Stickers for Containers and Bottles,Laundry Room Organization and Storage(White)
features: 【Package Includes】:You will receive 30 pcs white laundry labels for containers, including 28 different names and 2 blank labels.
【High Quality Material】: Made of high quality PVC, can be used for a long time. Perfect for organizing your laundry room and bathroom, make your life more organized.

【Easy to Use】: These laundry labels are easy to peel, easy to stick and easy to reposition. Simply peel off the labels and stick them on the smooth surface, no need to worry about bubbles and falling off.

【Minimalist Design】: Our laundry stickers are designed in a minimalist style,they all have a uniform look,beautiful and generous.The laundry labels add the perfect touch to the ordinary glass containers, pleasing to the eye.

【Laundry Room Labels Size】: 2.5 "x2.5", suitable for a variety of smooth jars and bottles. These laundry labels for glass jars, with clear printing, are easy to read, making it easy for you to distinguish the items inside the jars.
description: 30 PCS Minimalist Laundry Labels for Jars Color: White Product size: 2.5"X2.5" Features: 1.Easy to read, easy to apply and easy to reposition. 2.These waterproof labels are very professional and clean looking 3.The laundry labels really make a plain reusable bottle look so much more chic. 4.They look amazing and really make organization a breeze.
